Fallout plume modeling from downwind monitoring stations shows radioactive contamination spreading from the Ottawa detonation site.
Hospital network near Winnipeg reports being overwhelmed, requesting any available medical support.
Regional monitoring station reports radiation levels rising steadily downwind of Hamilton, evacuation advised beyond 50 km.
Ham radio report from near Whitehorse: ash and debris falling, radiation warning sirens active.
Citizen report near Cold Lake: power grid failure, no cell service.
